metadata.title: Darjeeling District - Block Development Officers & Official Addressing Guide (June 2026)
metadata.purpose: Accurate, up-to-date reference for Gorkhay AI to help illiterate users write correct formal letters/applications to BDOs and Gram Panchayats.

general_guidance.for_village_level_issues_certificates_co: Write to The Pradhan of the specific Gram Panchayat
general_guidance.for_block_level_schemes_mgnrega_housing_: Write to The Block Development Officer (BDO) of the concerned block
general_guidance.recommended_cc: Often people also mark a copy to the District Magistrate, Darjeeling for important matters

bdo.name: Shri Lalkpa Wangchu Sherpa
bdo.phone: Not publicly listed on official site

who_to_write_to.primary_for_gp_issues: The Pradhan, [Gram Panchayat Name] Gram Panchayat
who_to_write_to.primary_for_block_level: The Block Development Officer, Darjeeling – PulBazar Development Block
who_to_write_to.escalation: District Magistrate, Darjeeling or concerned department

blocks.standard_address_format:
The Block Development Officer
Darjeeling – PulBazar Development Block
Bijanbari, P.O. Bijanbari
Dist. Darjeeling, West Bengal - 734201
blocks.notes: Covers 23 Gram Panchayats including Lamahatta area is under Rangli Rangliot. Major hill block.

bdo.name: Shri Manoj Kumar Pahari
bdo.phone: Not publicly listed on official site

who_to_write_to.primary_for_gp_issues: The Pradhan, [Gram Panchayat Name] Gram Panchayat (e.g. Lamahatta GP)
who_to_write_to.primary_for_block_level: The Block Development Officer, Darjeeling – Rangli Rangliot Development Block

blocks.standard_address_format:
The Block Development Officer
Darjeeling – Rangli Rangliot Development Block
Takdah, P.O. Takdah
Dist. Darjeeling, West Bengal - 734222
blocks.notes: User's home block. Has good public GP contact data on bdotakdah.in. Covers Lamahatta GP.

bdo.name: Shri Arghya Guha
bdo.phone: Not publicly listed on official site

who_to_write_to.primary_for_gp_issues: The Pradhan, [Gram Panchayat Name] Gram Panchayat
who_to_write_to.primary_for_block_level: The Block Development Officer, Jorebunglow – Sukhia Pokhri Development Block

blocks.standard_address_format:
The Block Development Officer
Jorebunglow – Sukhia Pokhri Development Block
Sukhia Pokhri, Dist. Darjeeling, West Bengal
blocks.notes: Covers 16 Gram Panchayats. Popular tourist area (Ghum, Sonada side).

bdo.name: Shri Koushik Chakraborty
bdo.phone: Not publicly listed on official site

who_to_write_to.primary_for_gp_issues: The Pradhan, [Gram Panchayat Name] Gram Panchayat
who_to_write_to.primary_for_block_level: The Block Development Officer, Kurseong Development Block
who_to_write_to.escalation: Sub-Divisional Officer, Kurseong or District Magistrate

bdo.name: Shri Debottom Sarkar
